privileged_info_summary: The task involves comparing three insurance providers with different billing periods. SafeDrive Insurance charges $85/month (Liability), $320/semi-annually (Comprehensive), and $450/annually (Collision). QuickQuote Auto charges $78/month, $340/semi-annually, and $475/annually respectively. BudgetShield Cars charges $92/month, $295/semi-annually, and $425/annually. When converted to annual costs using the formula (monthly×12) + (semi×2) + annual, the totals are: SafeDrive $2,110/year, QuickQuote $2,091/year, and BudgetShield $2,119/year. QuickQuote Auto is the cheapest option at $2,091/year. The task requires creating a spreadsheet with these data, formulas to calculate annual totals, and conditional formatting to highlight the cheapest option.
